examples.text: [20] If a person is infected with a virus or bacteria, for example, their odor will be abnormal, and dogs are able to smell that change even if the human can't, because dogs have a much more powerful sense of smell than humans.
examples.explanation: 例如，如果一个人感染了病毒或细菌，其气味会变得异常，而即使人类无法察觉，狗也能嗅到这种变化，因为狗的嗅觉远比人类灵敏。
